name: Claude Certified Architect — Foundations
summary: Anthropic's first official technical credential (launched March 2026). Validates that you can design and ship production-grade Claude applications at enterprise scale — agentic systems, tool & MCP design, Claude Code operations, prompt engineering, and context/reliability.

exam.recommendedPrep: ~6 months hands-on Claude API + Claude Code

blueprintNote: Five weighted domains: D1 Agentic Architectures 27%, D2 Tool Design & MCP 18%, D3 Agent Operations & Claude Code 20%, D4 Prompt Engineering 20%, D5 Context & Reliability 15%. Verify against the official Anthropic Academy page before relying on weights.

officialResources.title: Anthropic Academy — official free prep
officialResources.annotation: The free course library is the closest thing to official study material. Work it end to end.

officialResources.title: Claude platform documentation
officialResources.annotation: Primary source for every technical claim on this track. When a community guide and the docs disagree, the docs win.

officialResources.title: Model Context Protocol — spec & concepts
officialResources.annotation: Read the transport, tools, resources, and prompts sections. Core to Domain 2.

officialResources.title: Community study guide (daronyondem)
officialResources.annotation: A solid community blueprint to cross-check coverage. Use it to find gaps, not to memorise answers.
